analysisTarget: API Timing vs State Initialization Race Conditions

step7.action: Conditional render: shows 'No pages found' error

raceConditionFailure.description: 170ms window where error is shown while APIs are still pending
raceConditionFailure.rootCause: useEffect condition (pages.length === 0 && !loading) evaluates before API completes

agentEndpoint.raceCondition: Updates loading state but not pages state

pagesEndpoint.raceCondition: Pages array empty during API call window

concurrentRequests.issue: Two APIs called concurrently with different loading states
concurrentRequests.crossComponentIssue: AgentDynamicPage checks wrapper loading, not its own

problematicPattern.issue: Empty array immediately triggers conditional logic

loadingStatePattern.issue: Starts as false, only true during API call
loadingStatePattern.timing: Brief window where loading=false but API incomplete

useEffectPattern.timing: Multiple evaluations during race condition window

errorCondition.intention: Show error when page not found after loading complete
errorCondition.actualBehavior: Shows error while APIs still loading
errorCondition.fix: Add pageLoading state specific to pages API

noPageCondition.intention: Show 'create first page' when no pages exist

loadingCondition.actualBehavior: Only shows when pages array empty AND loading true
loadingCondition.fix: Separate loading states for agent vs pages

missingTimeBasedTests: Test component behavior during 100-200ms API window
Test race condition between multiple useEffect calls
Test loading state transitions with mock delays
Test conditional rendering with simulated network latency
missingStateTransitionTests: Test initialPageId presence with empty pages array
Test error display timing vs API completion
Test component remount behavior with URL parameters
missingIntegrationTests: Test API response timing with real network delays
Test router navigation with dynamic page lookup
Test error boundary behavior during race conditions

inputFeatures.asyncOperations: concurrent API calls with different timing
inputFeatures.conditionalLogic: compound boolean expressions with timing dependencies

failureSignatures: Empty array initialization before async completion
Boolean logic evaluation during state transition windows
useEffect firing on partial state updates
preventionPatterns: Use loading states specific to each async operation
Implement state machines for complex async flows
Add race condition guards with minimum wait times
Use React Suspense boundaries for async components

testPatterns: Mock API responses with controlled timing
Test all combinations of loading/data states
Use Jest fake timers for race condition testing
Test component behavior at specific millisecond intervals
implementationPatterns: Separate loading states: agentLoading, pagesLoading, pageLoading
Use React Query or SWR for better async state management
Implement proper error boundaries with loading context
Add minimum loading delays to prevent flashing states
architecturePatterns: Single source of truth for loading states
URL-driven state management with proper suspense
